hero.alt: Education AI Dashboard showing student engagement, scheduling, and educational support solutions

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Welcome to EduSphere Learning. I’m your AI education assistant, here to help students, parents, and teachers with course information, admissions, and academic support — anytime. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I want to know about courses related to data science.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great choice. Are you a student, a working professional, or a parent inquiring for someone else?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’m a final year student.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. We offer a six month data science certification, and a one year advanced data science program.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you like details on curriculum, fees, or career outcomes?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’d like to know about fees and placement support.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Sure. The six month certification costs sixty five thousand rupees.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: The advanced program costs one lakh twenty thousand rupees. Both include live mentor sessions, hands on projects, and placement assistance.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you like to speak with an academic counselor?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, that would be helpful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great. I see availability today at six p.m., or tomorrow at eleven a.m. Which works better?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Tomorrow at eleven a.m.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Your counseling session is scheduled for tomorrow at eleven a.m.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’ll receive a confirmation message and course brochure shortly.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you also like updates on scholarships or admission deadlines?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, scholarship details would be great.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. I’ll share scholarship information with you.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: No, that’s all. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. Thank you for choosing EduSphere Learning. We look forward to supporting your learning journey. Have a great day.
